DoorType.LockedMessage: ^t I need secure Kurtlarin Sonu first.=^t Once goblinler ve olumsuz are under control...=^t I'll be able head inland rest Ellyria.
^t I should go back kasaba=^t I should konus villagers icinde kasaba
^t That path leads nehir=^t ile goblin tracks icinde ve out=^t villagers might know daha about this
^t bir dank tomb=^t ile goblin tracks icinde ve out=^t villagers west might know daha about this
^t It's closed ve kilitli=^t yok one has been here icinde bir long, long sure.=^t Maybe someone icinde Kurtlarin Sonu knows daha about it.
^t koyu ve impassable=^t Are those orumcek webs?=^t Ick=^t yok one's going Fel Koprusu that way yet.
^t Someone has fortified this kule.=^t I should check icinde ile soldiers kaynakli Kurtlarin Sonu.=^t They've had sure scout alan.
^t bir kule bir happier sure=^t Those villagers can yardim beni plan benim plundering
^t bir Tuatara fort.=^t I should see if benim muttefikler know daha about it.=^t So I know what I'm getting into.
^t Lots big animal tracks around here.=^t I should see if scouts know daha about what's inside.
^t Citadel Wissen.=^t I need check ile scouts ve see if they know daha about who's inside.
^t This granary used feed thousands.=^t Some soldiers kaynakli Kurtlarin Sonu will know daha about it.
^t This eski citadel is stranger than others.=^t I wonder what scouts have ogrenildi about it.
^t There is bir huge graveyard behind this gate.=^t Fel Koprusu folk might know daha about this.
^t bir powerful buyu bariyer blocks way.=^t This kopru leads Hocke Kalesi=^t I need figure out how get icinde there.=^t ve how be ready icin what's inside.
^t gate seems be kilitli=^t Maybe other entrance is ac
^t This yol leads into Firtina Tasi Daglari.=^t It is little used except by canavarlar now.=^t I may bul need go there.=^t But first let's get Fel Koprusu sorted.
^t bir powerful buyu seals this entrance.=^t I still need ogren daha about uyuyan topraklar.
^t Maybe I should head kasaba bul out daha.
^t derin woods.=^t There are bandit tracks tum over this forest.=^t Many tracks go east kaynakli here.
^t bir koyu cavern.=^t Nowhere I want go right now.
^t Steward's house.=^t It looks neat ve clean inside.
^t bir closed mausoleum.=^t It looks like someone lives here.=^t I'll check ile benim dost kaynakli Kurtlarin Sonu andfind outpost west ve ask them.
^t Another dusty mausoleum.=^t I wonder if they know daha at outpost.
^t Another grim tomb.=^t It says 'Here lies Lord Crovnag.'=^t I wonder who that was.=^t witch Yagarah might know.
^t bir grim, koyu tomb.=^t I wonder if they know daha at outpost.
^t Yet another koyu zindan door.=^t Like so many uzerinde this tepe.=^t witch Yagarah could tell beni daha.
^t It's closed ve kilitli.=^t ve grim ve koyu.=^t witch Yagarah can yardim beni figure out which mausoleums Nephit might be icinde.
^t It's closed ve kilitli=^t I wonder if that witch can yardim beni ogren daha about this place.
^t Nice waterfall.
^t path is crumbled ve impassable.=^t It heads around mountainside.
^t bir koyu cavern.=^t goblin tracks lead icinde.=^t villagers might be able tell beni daha.=^t Better bul out what I'm getting into...=^t Before I tear these goblinler up.
^t bir crevice icinde mountainside.=^t Probably certain olum icinde there.=^t Theexpeditin kaynakli Fel Koprusu might know this dag better.
^t Another tunnel into dag.=^t Like many.=^t I should check ile expedition kaynakli Fel Koprusu.
^t bir mysterious doorway.=^t I wonder why that heykel is here.=^t Fel Koprusu folk could tell beni daha.
^t nehir leads up into rocks.=^t Moai could tell beni where icinde these mountains Meylour's followers are.
^t It's kilitli.=^t expedition kaynakli Fel Koprusu might be able tell daha daha.
^t bir tunnel.=^t expedition member may know daha.
^t Abandoned mineshaft.=^t Probably nothing icinde there.=^t expedition might know daha.
^t I'm going clear these caves before I ayril.
^t Abandoned mineshaft.=^t Probably nothing icinde there.=^t expedition might know daha.
^t I'm going clear this cave before I ayril.
^t derin abandoned mineshaft.=^t Probably nothing icinde there.=^t expedition might know daha.
^t I'm going clear this cave before I ayril.
^t Deeper abandoned mineshaft.=^t Probably nothing icinde there.=^t expedition might know daha.
^t I'm going clear this cave before I ayril.
^t Mysterious cavern=^t Half collapsed=^t Do I see glowing rock?=^t I hope I never have need go icinde there

^t Another Dreadfold Portal. Like one icinde Fel Koprusu, but closed.=^t bir shortcut dehset doppelganger these cayirlar?=^t ac this gate, I must cross into Dreadfold by Fel Koprusu Portal.=^t ve bul this portal's twin icinde dehset Zumrut Cayirlari.
^t bir strange side path.=^t Maybe that dryad back west can tell beni daha.
^t bir hole icinde trunk.=^t Those dryads might be able tell beni daha.
^t bir hole icinde kok salar.=^t These dryads might know where it leads.
^t bir strange tapinak.=^t dryads might tell bir bit daha about what I'm getting into here.
^t bir strange ruin=^t dryads might tell bir bit daha about what I'm getting into here
^t bir koyu sidedoor.=^t I should ask survivors where it leads.
^t bir side path other side battlefield.=^t survivors icinde courtyard might know daha.
^t door this kadim kule is barred.=^t I need password.
^t bir koyu passage.=^t Maybe wizard Titus will know daha.
^t bir zindan entrance.=^t Maybe Titus can tell beni where it leads.
^t Whoa, hot buyu.=^t I should ask Titus about this.
^t I'm degil ready yet.=^t I should take care things here first.

^t Another Dreadfold Portal. Like one icinde Fel Koprusu, but closed=^t bir shortcut dehset Shazari, yok doubt=^t ac this gate, I can cross into Dreadfold by Fel Koprusu Portal=^t Then make benim way this portal's twin icinde dehset Shazari=^t Do I dare?
^t Titus should be able tell beni about this strange door.=^t I saw him back west.
^t bir strange passage down.=^t I hear strange chittering.=^t I can ask those col folk what's inside.
^t I hear clash arms below.=^t I bet col townsfolk can tell beni daha.
^t bir strange gate.=^t Gzarek ve his nomads might know where it leads.
^t bir mysterious burial ground.=^t I'll ask guy ile dog head what he knows.=^t Naturally.
^t That is one colossal pyramid.=^t Perhaps Titus can tell beni lore this place.=^t I will ask him what he can tell beni.

^t Another Dreadfold Portal. Like one icinde Fel Koprusu, but closed=^t bir shortcut dehset Val Limani, yok doubt=^t ac this gate, I can cross into Dreadfold by Fel Koprusu Portal=^t Then make benim way this portal's twin icinde dehset Val Limani=^t Do I dare?
^t This is one shady alley.=^t I shouldn't be here.
^t Looks like he went this way.=^t Better take care this mess first.
^t I wonder why this tea shop is kilitli.=^t Maybe someone icinde kasaba knows.
^t sewer opening is soguk ve koyu.=^t I hear eerie voices echo kaynakli icindeki.
^t I have strayed far kaynakli kasaba.=^t I should head back.
^t These doors must enclose buyuk secrets.=^t Someone has know how get icinde.
^t This palace is impressive ve uninviting.=^t I better go before guards comes.
^t This must be sehir barracks.=^t imperial army is huge.
^t door creaks ve cracks kaynakli age.=^t This door seems out place.
^t Looks like bir kadim vault.=^t Better turn back before I get lost.
^t Word uzerinde street is some pretty bad people roam these parts.=^t I should go search icin daha information.
^t Looks like one imparator muhafiz towers.=^t They sure do hisar bir tight watch.
^t Looks like one imparator muhafiz towers.=^t There is so much security here.
^t This seems better fortified than before=^t Maybe villagers know daha about this
^t That path leads nehir=^t ile goblin tracks icinde ve out=^t villagers might know daha about this
^t bir dank tomb=^t ile goblin tracks icinde ve out=^t villagers west might know daha about this
^t It's closed ve kilitli=^t I think I can see evil seeping out=^t Maybe these villagers know whether it holds plunder=^t..veya certain olum
^t Someone has fortified this kule.=^t I should check icinde ile soldiers kaynakli Kurtlarin Sonu.=^t They've had sure scout alan.
^t bir kule bir happier sure=^t Those villagers can yardim beni plan benim plundering
^t bir Tuatara fort.=^t I should see if benim muttefikler know daha about it.=^t So I know what I'm getting into.
^t Lots big animal tracks around here.=^t I should see if scouts know daha about what's inside.
^t Citadel Wissen.=^t I need check ile scouts ve see if they know daha about who's inside.
^t This granary used feed thousands.=^t Some soldiers kaynakli Kurtlarin Sonu will know daha about it.
^t This eski citadel is stranger than others.=^t I wonder what scouts have ogrenildi about it.
^t koyu ve impassable=^t Are those orumcek webs?=^t Ick=^t yok one's going Fel Koprusu that way.
^t There is too much evil behind this gate.=^t Fel Koprusu folk might know daha about this.
^t way is blocked by powerful buyu.=^t This kopru leads Hocke Kalesi.=^t I need figure out how get icinde there.=^t ve how be ready icin what's inside.
^t gate seems be kilitli.=^t Maybe other entrance is ac.
^This yol leads into Firtina Tasi Daglari=^t It is little used except by canavarlar now=^t I may bul need go there=^t But first let's get Fel Koprusu sorted
^t Maybe I should head kasaba bul out daha.
^t derin woods.=^t There are bandit tracks tum over this forest.=^t Many tracks go east kaynakli here.
^t bir koyu cavern.=^t Nowhere I want go right now.
^t Steward's house.=^t It looks neat ve clean inside.
^t bir closed mausoleum.=^t It looks like someone lives here.=^t I'll check ile benim dost kaynakli Kurtlarin Sonu andfind outpost west ve ask them.
^t Another dusty mausoleum.=^t I wonder if they know daha at outpost.
^t Another grim tomb.=^t It says 'Here lies Lord Crovnag.'=^t I wonder who that was.=^t witch Yagarah might know.
^t bir grim, koyu tomb.=^t I wonder if they know daha at outpost.
^t Yet another koyu zindan door.=^t Like so many uzerinde this tepe.=^t witch Yagarah could tell beni daha.
^t It's closed ve kilitli.=^t ve grim ve koyu.=^t witch Yagarah can yardim beni figure out which mausoleums Nephit might be icinde.
^t It's closed ve kilitli=^t I wonder if that witch can yardim beni ogren daha about this place.
^t Nice waterfall.
^t path is crumbled ve impassable.=^t It heads around mountainside.
^t bir koyu cavern.=^t goblin tracks lead icinde.=^t villagers might be able tell beni daha.=^t Better bul out what I'm getting into...=^t Before I tear these goblinler up.
^t bir crevice icinde mountainside.=^t Probably certain olum icinde there.=^t Theexpeditin kaynakli Fel Koprusu might know this dag better.
^t Another tunnel into dag.=^t Like many.=^t I should check ile expedition kaynakli Fel Koprusu.
^t bir mysterious doorway.=^t I wonder why that heykel is here.=^t Fel Koprusu folk could tell beni daha.
^t nehir leads up into rocks.=^t Moai could tell beni where icinde these mountains Meylour's followers are.
^t It's kilitli.=^t expedition kaynakli Fel Koprusu might be able tell daha daha.
^t bir tunnel.=^t expedition member may know daha.
^t Abandoned mineshaft.=^t Probably nothing icinde there.=^t expedition might know daha.
^t I'm going clear these caves before I ayril.
^t Abandoned mineshaft.=^t Probably nothing icinde there.=^t expedition might know daha.
^t I'm going clear this cave before I ayril.
^t derin abandoned mineshaft.=^t Probably nothing icinde there.=^t expedition might know daha.
^t I'm going clear this cave before I ayril.
^t Deeper abandoned mineshaft.=^t Probably nothing icinde there.=^t expedition might know daha.
^t I'm going clear this zindan before I ayril.
^t Mysterious cavern=^t Half collapsed=^t Do I see glowing rock?=^t I hope I never have need go icinde there

^t Another Dreadfold Portal. Like one icinde Fel Koprusu, but closed=^t bir shortcut dehset doppelganger these cayirlar?=^t ac this gate, I must cross into Dreadfold by Fel Koprusu Portal=^t ve bul this portal's twin icinde dehset Zumrut Cayirlari

^t bir strange tapinak=^t dryads might tell bir bit daha about what I'm getting into here=^t Many ruined temples have daha olum than treasure=^t bir little preparation goes bir long way=^t benim grandpappy used say

^t bir strange ruin=^t dryads might tell bir bit daha about what I'm getting into here=^t Many ruined temples have daha olum than treasure=^t bir little preparation goes bir long way=^t benim grandpappy used say

^t bir strange passage down.=^t I hear strange chittering.=^t I can ask those col folk what's inside.
^t I hear clash arms below.=^t I bet col townsfolk can tell beni daha.
^t bir strange gate.=^t Gzarek ve his nomads might know where it leads.
^t bir mysterious burial ground.=^t I'll ask guy ile dog head what he knows.=^t Naturally.
^t That is one colossal pyramid.=^t Perhaps Titus can tell beni lore this place.=^t I will ask him what he can tell beni.
^t That is one colossal pyramid=^t Perhaps Titus can tell beni lore this place=^t I will ask him what he can tell beni

^t Another Dreadfold Portal. Like one icinde Fel Koprusu, but closed=^t bir shortcut dehset Val Limani, yok doubt=^t ac this gate, I can cross into Dreadfold by Fel Koprusu Portal=^t Then make benim way this portal's twin icinde dehset Val Limani=^t Do I dare?

^t Looks like he went this way.=^t Better take care this mess first.
^t I wonder why this tea shop is kilitli.=^t Maybe someone icinde kasaba knows.

^t This palace is impressive ve uninviting.=^t I better go before guards comes.

^t door creaks ve cracks kaynakli age.=^t This door seems out place.
^t Looks like bir kadim vault.=^t Better turn back before I get lost.
^t Word uzerinde street is some pretty bad people roam these parts.=^t I should go search icin daha information.
^t Looks like one imparator muhafiz towers.=^t They sure do hisar bir tight watch.
^t Looks like one imparator muhafiz towers.=^t There is so much security here.
